focus: resting-pose tentacles (retract, only clubs protrude) + bigger clubs + W-pupil in 3/4

A.hypothesis: RESTING TENTACLES — very low extension, tentacle tucks into arm crown, only club tip shows

B.hypothesis: BIG CLUB — moderate extension with dramatic fist-like club bulge

C.hypothesis: EYE POP — stronger inward yaw + bigger pupil so W reads in 3/4

D.hypothesis: COMBINE — resting-pose tentacles + big clubs + stronger eye read
